name: valid FAQ entry with all required fields
missing required field returns needs_review or blocked
risky claim in answer_draft returns blocked
needs_research source_status cannot be final answer
high claim_risk_level conflicts with schema_eligible candidate
blocked decision conflicts with shopify_block_eligible candidate
approved_for_export is not allowed without manual review
report JSON contains no Chinese descriptions
overall decision is blocked if any entry is blocked
overall decision is needs_review if entries require review
